headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://oauth2.googleapis.com https://sheets.googleapis.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https:; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
